transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, First National, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My balance is wrong. I transferred in six hundred pounds yesterday afternoon and it's still not there.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, looking at your account... I can see a transfer pending.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Pending? What does that mean? When will it clear?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It should update soon. These things take time.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It's been almost twenty-four hours. Is there something wrong with it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It doesn't look wrong. Probably just the weekend affecting things.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So will it definitely be there by tonight?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'd expect so, yes. Just keep an eye on it.

planted_violations: incomplete identity verification — name only, no date of birth or security check
vague and uncommitted response; did not explain processing timeframe or offer trace
no follow-up action taken or reference logged
